name: Full-Stack Feature Sprint
description: 3-session template for a complete feature: API + UI + tests

variables.name: featureName
variables.description: The name of the feature being built

sessions.name: {{featureName}} — API layer
sessions.prompt: Implement the API endpoints for {{featureName}} on branch {{targetBranch}}. Focus on routes, validation, and error handling.

sessions.name: {{featureName}} — UI layer
sessions.prompt: Implement the React UI components for {{featureName}}. Use the API endpoints built in the API session.

sessions.name: {{featureName}} — Tests
sessions.prompt: Write integration tests for {{featureName}} covering both the API and UI layers.
